conditions: so that i can base my feedback on these deliverables
so that this can be easily found by the team
so that accidentally added files do not clutter up file management
so that i can find previous versions of files
so that work can be split up into actionable parts
so that unneeded files for a task do not clutter up the workspace
so that it is clear for a team member a team member are responsible to handle this work
so that team members do not have unnecessary access to a task and its related files
so that project work can be further split up to the smallest possible unit of work
so that i can assess the work of team members
so that i can process feedback that was given on a task feedback that was given on a task
